untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (Inverted Cup-with-Handle formation) and manual trend line drawing, which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The pattern geometry, handle formation, and breakout point require visual/structural analysis not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Pattern-based signals require structural price analysis beyond available indicators. Attempted proxy: entry on down close below previous close (downward momentum at breakout). Exit on close above previous high (pattern failure/reversal). Success rate (29.83% average decline, 31.93% median) and pattern height (2.50) from source text cannot be parameterized. Stop-loss and exact target levels not specified in source excerpt, using reasonable defaults for SHORT position.
